parties.name: CHU, HIN KWAN 1406 34TH AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94122

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: August 7, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Hin Kwan Chu was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Lin Hong Tan was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Brian Hin Kwan Chu.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
